task_origin: Prepared by ChatGPT for file-based handoff after RM1.21-B/C/D
purpose: Official schema-data kits for native 5-star launch_base heroes.

design_rules.rarity_identity: 5-star heroes should feel premium and strongly role-defining without requiring the unique signature complexity reserved for 6-star heroes.
design_rules.effect_budget: 2-3 effects allowed on skill/ultimate when identity supports it
design_rules.advanced_mechanics: allowed in controlled form; revive/summon reserved for carefully approved high-rarity future kits
design_rules.runtime_policy: design-data only; no DB/runtime behavior implied until imported and implemented explicitly

greek_nemean_lioness.name: Leonessa Nemea

kit_complexity.rarity_rule: 5★ complete identity kit with basic + skill + ultimate_or_special + passive

basic_attack.name: Colpo Tellurico
basic_attack.description: Attacco base coerente con elemento e ruolo.

skill.name: Pelle Invulnerabile
skill.description: Taunta il nemico principale e riduce i danni subiti.

ultimate_or_special.name: Ruggito Nemeo
ultimate_or_special.description: Danneggia tutti i nemici e riduce il loro attacco.

passive.name: Mantello del Leone
passive.description: Aumenta HP e riduzione danni quando è sopra metà vita.

runtime_compatibility_notes: schema_data_only
not_imported_to_db
runtime_legacy_mapping provided as compatibility hint only
advanced effects may require runtime implementation before activation
combat_qa_notes: Must be validated in Combat QA Lab after asset/runtime import.
Check idle, attack, skill, hit, death, scale, no fallback asset, no unwanted glow.
If kit uses AoE/DoT/control/shield/heal, validate with 6-enemy QA setup.
